title: Gold and silver's historic rally could resume 'as fog of war lifts', market watchers say
summary_full: On Thursday, spot gold jumped 1.2% to $4,750 per ounce amid hopes that the U.S. and Iran could be nearing a deal to bring the 69-day war to an end.
summary_public: On Thursday, spot gold jumped 1.2% to $4,750 per ounce amid hopes that the U.S. and Iran could be nearing a deal to bring the 69-day war to an end.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: hopes that the U.S. and Iran could be nearing a deal
